description.value: > Construct Associated Domain: Artifice. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the dancing weapons power of the Artifice domain. Animate Servant (Su): At 8th level, as a standard action, you can give life to inanimate objects. This ability functions as animate objects using your cleric level as the caster level. You can use this ability once per day at 8th level, and one additional time per day for every four levels beyond 8th. Replacement Domain Spells: 7thâ limited wish, 8thâ polymorph any object.
